nasb.text: For My people have forgotten Me, They burn incense to worthless gods And they have stumbled from their ways, From the ancient paths, To walk in bypaths, Not on a highway,

esv.text: But my people have forgotten me; they make offerings to false gods; they made them stumble in their ways, in the ancient roads, and to walk into side roads, not the highway,

cnv.text: 但我的子民竟忘記我， 向虛無的偶像燒香， 以致他們在自己的路上、 在古道上絆倒， 行走小路，不是修建過的大道。

ccb.text: 然而，我的子民却把我抛诸脑后， 向虚无的神明烧香， 偏离古道，在歧途上绊绊跌跌。
